scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports testing-policy summaries for this school. If official score distributions were not captured, the panel stays policy-only rather than inventing ranges.
policy: Johns Hopkins requires standardized testing for first-year applicants and reviews self-reported or official SAT/ACT scores as part of holistic review.

claims.claim: Johns Hopkins requires standardized testing for first-year applicants and reviews self-reported or official SAT/ACT scores as part of holistic review.
